title: High stakes battle in Katihar as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Katihar. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Women voters of Katihar demand better primary healthcare and clean water

snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Katihar assembly segment.
